configurations.name: gateway
runtimeArgs: set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null; set +a && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn services.gateway.main:app --port 8000 --reload

configurations.name: computation
runtimeArgs: set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null; set +a && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn services.computation.main:app --port 8001 --reload

configurations.name: reports
runtimeArgs: set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null; set +a && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn services.reports.main:app --port 8002 --reload
